_comment: Golden master fixture for parseDump() — Bolt 1.1 (2026-03-07)
_purpose: Verify that extraction from mindflow.jsx → claude.js did not change response STRUCTURE. AI output is non-deterministic so we validate schema, not exact content.
_howToUse: When Vitest is set up (Sprint 5), write a schema-validation test that calls parseDump() with 'input' and asserts the response matches 'expectedSchema'.

input.rawText: Call mom today, buy groceries, need to launch the website this week, write 500 words for the blog, set reminder to pay rent on friday

knownExpectations.itemCount: ≥ 4 (call mom, groceries, website launch, blog writing, rent reminder = 5 items)
knownExpectations.reminderPresent: At least one item should have reminderAt set (rent on friday)
knownExpectations.callMomPriority: Call mom + today keyword → priority should be medium or high

note: Run parseDump() manually before and after extraction to confirm output structure is unchanged. Full automated testing in Sprint 5 (Vitest setup).
